problem id: 01248b76
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  01101100 -> 00011000
  01010011 -> 10010110
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11011010 -> 00010101
  00011010 -> 10010100
  00000001 -> 00010010
  11110110 -> 10001101
  01100110 -> 10101100

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 11000101
